feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Adding custom dropdown fields to Standard FIORI "Manage Customer Master Data" Application
entry.content:
We have a requirement to add custom drop-down fields in Standard FIORI Application "Manage Customer Master Data".

Please provide some guidance on how to achieve this.

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: How to run MR22(Debit/Credit Material) Mass upload in S/4 HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello seniors!

 

Material valuation app of S/4 HANA CLOUD Pubilc edition. I understand the Excel bulk change function, which is the same function as MR21 (Change Inventory Price) in the Private Edition.

However, I did not find the Debit/Credit Material Excel bulk change function, which is the same function as MR22 in the Private Edition.

Can you tell me how to run MR22 Debit/Credit Material in Excel mass change in the Manage Valuation App?

Thanks in advance
huny

entry.title: Available Options for having Custom Description in Invoice Items for Customer Projects.
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts,

We have a business requirement, where the business is looking to have a custom text in the Invoice output at the Item Description. We are searching out all available options for this requirement.

1)Is there any SAP standard option which allows us to change the Item description in the Invoice output ?

2) If we take a Custom field approach to create CDS views for BADI, we are stuck in identifying the linkage between Customer Project product in Billing tab and the Billing Document. 

Please, let us know your expert opinions on this topic ?

Thanks,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Trigger logic in MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM BAdI
entry.content:
I would like to create auto increase number custom field in Manage Purchase Order app.

My current development steps are as following

1. I added a custom field to Purchase Order item screen using In-App Extensibility.

2. I created new custom BO to save current increase number.

3. Write logic in Modify Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM ) BAdI.

The problem here is the number is always increasing everytime I enter to Manage Purchase Order screen without saving or with saving. 

And, the number keeps increasing even when I only enter to Purchase Order screen just for looking information.

So, I would like to ask that

 in Manage Purchase Order app, is there any BAdI that will be trigger only when Save button is clicked (like Before Save event) and also custom field can be used ?

(Or)

 Is there any condition that can be added in Modify Purchase Order Item (MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM ) BAdI to trigger only when Save button is clicked?

entry.title: Assign tax indicators to tax condition types in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello! Can anyone tell me in sap s4hana public cloud where can I assign the material/customer tax indicators to a custom tax condition type? I can't find this configuration point in CBC...

In SAP S4 we used OVK3 OVK4, but here I can't find it...

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Mass change for MR22 (Material debit/credit)
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are going to design a development program to do mass MR22. We want to find any CDS which involves MR22 entries or any BAPI for MR22. 

Could you please tell me how to figure it out

Thank you

entry.title: Achieving Real-Time S/4HANA Cloud Data Replication in SAP Datasphere Without DP Agent
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm looking for a solution to archieve real-time data replication from S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Datasphere without using an on-premise Data Provisioning Agent. Without a DP agent, currently it seems we're limited to Data Flows and Replication Flows, which don't support real-time replication or remote table access for views. Is this right?

Has anyone managed to bypass the need for a DP Agent to enable real-time replication and remote table functionality? I've checked the roadmap but found no hints for this functionality (https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?range=2023Q1-2025Q1&PRODUCT=73555000100800002141#Q1%202024). 

Best regards
Tim

entry.title: Invalid number of local collections. Open an incident while creating custom business object
entry.content:
Hi all,

I faced an error when tried to create a custom business object in S/4 HANA cloud. Before this error, I was getting error Items of type XXX must not be edited in this tenant which get resolved by the notes: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3248190

What step did I missed out to activate to allow me to create custom business object?

Thanks. 

Regards,

Ben

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Public Cloud Edition: Email status 'sent' in app: Monitor Email Transmission but not reach to gmail
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 

I have configured the sender and receiver in "Manage your solution".

The PO approval email generated in "Monitor Email Transmission" app and showing status as sent but with status code 718.

The email not reach to recipient mailbox. Do you have any idea what to check for this?

Appreciate for your help.

Thanks & Regards

Monddes

entry.title: Valuated stock in transit in Advanced Intercompany Sales
entry.content: We activated Advanced Intercompany Sales Scope item and we need the system to not use the Valuated stock in transit steps as the goods are directly issued to the customer from the delivering company so there is no need to move the goods from delivering plant to transit plant and from transit plant to selling company plant then issue to the customer, so please advice how we can modify the cycle to directly issue the goods from the delivering plant to the end customer.

entry.title: Manage Email Template Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can some one please support on topic of Email Template in Public Cloud on how the configuration are done for the objects.

Thanks

entry.title: Duplicate EDI - Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

is there a possibility to activate the "Duplicate" Button for EDI Outputs?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Estorno Brazil - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,


how can we handle the Estorno (engl. Chargeback process) for NF-e in Brazil?

This is a legal required process in Brazil (Invoice reversal: when and how to do it? (nfe.io)).

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Connect SAP BTP to S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
I want to Deploy my Fiori app to Sap S4hana Public Cloud, I stuck in problem when try to create a Fiori app on SAP BAS
I am Follow this tutorials on SAP Developers, 

 Create a SAP Fiori App and Deploy it to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials

I have done Step 2 and Step 3 

Communication system on SAP S4hana Cloud Side

 

Destination on SAP BTP Side 

Connection is fine 

My Problem:

I Think that there are any change in SAMLAssertion Authentication ? Because I have done this tutorial 5 months ago but now I'm facing the problem with same settings. The Error tell me that maybe my destination not works ? there are any setting that I'm missing

I'm waiting for yours solutions, 
Thanks

entry.title: Notification when Communication user is locked
entry.content:
Hi;

Is there a way to get our internal support team notified once a communication user is locked? We had an issue where additional api validation caused one of our communication being locked resulting in subsequent business process to fail.

It would be ideal if we can configure a notification email once a communication is locked.

Thanks

Thomas

entry.title: CoCd &, ledger 0L: First Close the fiscal years before 2023 in FI-AA
entry.content:
Hi All,

User is trying to open posting periods and receive error - CoCd &, ledger 0L: First Close the fiscal years before 2023 in FI-AA

If user untick A (Assets) Account type the user is able to open the desired periods.

Please can you advise why user is encountering above error.

Many thanks

Monali

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud  SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance

entry.title: PR Attachment not visible in PO (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi All

Unable to process the Attachment From Purchase requestion to Purchase Order Which are created by the Sales Order. Can you please advice how this can be achieved.

Thanks

Case- 1 Created the Purchase Requestion by Sales Order and converted into Purchase Order.

Result: Unable to See the Attachment in the Purchase Order

Case- 2 Creating a Normal Purchase Requestion and converting into Purchase Order I am able to see the Attachment.

Created a PR and Attached the doc.

Converted Purchase Requestion to Purchase Order

Result: Able to see the Attachment in the Purchase Order.

entry.title: Debt and Investment Management
entry.content:
Hi,

our customer is working as an investment holding that issues and receives loans for/from several intercompany partner. Apart from that they investment money at different places. For example they buy shares of different companies worldwide.

My question is how we can track/manage these investments and how we can valuate these investments with certain percentage rate or market values. Has anyone experience in that kind of topic?

Thank you so much!

Best,

Marcel

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: the Right Cloud ERP Solution for Your Business
entry.content:
An introduction: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Over half a century ago, two of SAP's co-founders pioneered a system designed to process business transaction entries in real time. This marked the inception of a visionary journey aimed at creating a standardized program capable of seamlessly integrating business processes by processing enterprise data in real time. This visionary concept laid the foundation for the remarkable success story of SAP Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) Software, a legacy that endures to this day. [SAP's history - fifty years and counting] 

An Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system integrates all the essential business functions into a single, unified platform, connecting business operations seamlessly together. ERP Software has gone an evolutionary path and in recent years Cloud ERP has gained significant traction. As opposed to traditional on-premises ERP systems installed and maintained on local servers, a Cloud ERP system is hosted on remote servers and can be accessed anytime, anywhere, from any internet-enabled device.  

In the fast-paced world of ERP systems, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has emerged as a leading solution [read the analyst’s reports] for businesses seeking to streamline operations, to drive innovation, and to stay ahead of the competition. In this 5-minute read, I ‘d like to walk you through the key features, including the SaaS qualities of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, for businesses considering adoption. 

Highlights of Key Features and Capabilities: 

1. Unified Business Insights. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition provides a cohesive view of your business by seamlessly integrating essential functional modules. Leveraging SAP's deep industry knowledge, the solution incorporates pre-configured business process best practices. With over 50 local country/region versions and support for 30+ languages, it adapts effortlessly to diverse regulatory frameworks, including local tax laws and GAAP financial standards. This global-ready solution empowers your business to thrive on the international stage. 
Explore a comprehensive array of modules covering finance, procurement, customer order management, after-sales service, manufacturing, and supply chain management. By integrating finance and operations seamlessly on a unified platform, You can prioritize essential modules to start with, for example, finance and accounting, to gain consolidated cross-organizational financial insights and as business needs evolve, additional modules can be seamlessly added without the hassle of implementing a second Cloud ERP instance, ensuring scalability and flexibility for long-term growth.          

(Chart 1. Full-featured SaaS Cloud ERP)

2. Adaptability and extensibility. You have access to a comprehensive toolset to adapt the Cloud ERP solution to match your unique business needs, fostering innovation and better alignment with evolving business requirements.    

Customization capability. Utilizing a guided customization procedure, you can tailor pre-defined best practices processes to accommodate your specific process variations and workflows. This ensures that your ERP system functions optimally and aligns perfectly with your organizational processes and structures. 

 

  (Chart 2 – Customization Example: Approve Bank Payment) 

 Extensibility and Integration. 

        There are multiple choices for you to extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for your different use
        cases.           

 (Chart 3. Extensibility Options Use Cases)

      To explore the technical details of each extensibility, please follow the online documents:

Key User Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Developer Extensibility in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ABAP Environment 

Side-by-Side Extensibility in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) 

Furthermore, SAP provides a comprehensive range of technical components, including APIs, Business Events, and BAPIs/IDocs, facilitating the smooth integration of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition into your current infrastructure. Please check out details on SAP Business Accelerator Hub    

3. Continuous Innovation. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition prioritizes continuous innovation by embracing agile development methodologies and actively listening to feedback from customers. This iterative approach allows for rapid delivery of new features and enhancements at a pace of two major releases a year accompanied by monthly innovation updates.  

The agility of SaaS delivery makes it possible that SAP can quickly incorporate advanced technologies, such as predictive analytics, machine learning and artificial intelligence, allowing companies to benefit from modern technologies with least effort.  

Notably, SAP has recently launched the Early Adopter Care program for the Digital Assistant Joule, specifically tailored to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition users. See Joule in Action and experience the future of intelligent ERP solutions.  

 (Chart 4. Joule and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition)

4. Modern User Experience. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is designed with clean layouts, intuitive navigation, and consistent design patterns. Business users can easily find all the information needed to accomplish their daily tasks, such as, “To Dos”, “Favorite Apps” or “Insights” with analytics dashboards. With two or three clicks business users can rapidly personalize the working pages. With embedded collaboration tool, such as SAP Collaboration Manager or using native integration with MS Teams, it is easy and fast for business users to exchange information across the department.  

 (Chart 5. Home Page for Sales Clerk) 

5. Built-in security and compliance.  By choosing SAP to manage the security of your cloud ERP network, operating system, database, and application, you gain the advantage of a unified and cohesive security approach. Data Encryption, Identity and Access Management, Audit Trials and Logging, Data residency and privacy controls are examples in how SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition safeguards your critical business data by fulfilling the highest industry standards. With SAP regularly security updates, your system is protected best so that you can focus on pursuing your business objectives.  

6. Subscription licensing model. The subscription to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition operates on an annual license fee basis, encompassing cloud infrastructure, core business modules, optional add-ons, and user licenses. With this flexible model, you pay only for the resources and features your business requires. Scaling up is seamless, allowing for the activation of additional functional modules and user licenses to accommodate business growth effortlessly. 

Companies Business Benefits 

Companies who have adopted SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition are reporting the significant business benefits about efficiency improvements, business  transparency, and the fast speed of innovation adoption.  

“After just a few months, we can see that our processes became faster and more efficient. We now have a much better grip on production, stock, and delivery times, allowing us to serve our customers even better.” [read the full story] 

“Working with SAP, we’re building a cloud-based business platform that’s fit for the future in a dynamic market, facilitates business process standardization and integration across Asia Pacific and the world, and achieves supply chain excellence along the industry value chain.” [read the full story] 

Please find more SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition success stories here 

Summary 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is SAP’s SaaS Cloud ERP offering, that leverages the power of SAP's flagship S/4HANA platform to deliver real-time insights, intelligent automation, and streamlined processes. Built on a multi-tenant architecture, the Public Edition offers scalability, agility, and rapid innovation, enabling businesses to adapt to changing market dynamics and drive digital transformation. 

Find out more about SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition on www.sap.com/s4hana and request a demo to start your exploration with SAP or SAP’s partner today.  

 

Recommended read: Busting the Biggest ERP Myth - That it's Not Suitable for SMBs

entry.title: Update Supplier Master Data through migration cockpit
entry.content:
I just uploaded supplier master data through migration cockpit, but I forgot to fill in the purchasing organization data sheet. I tried to re upload with only fill in the Purchasing Organization Data sheet and General Data sheet (the mandatory column only). but i can not upload transfer the data to staging tables, the error message is Cannot insert 1100000090 into table /1LT/DSZOS000097 (S_SUPPL_GEN); instance already exists in the table. But if I am not fill in the data in General Data sheet, I still can't upload the data , the error message is 

Sheet General Data, field BP Grouping, row 9 is empty; enter value for the mandatory field.

Is there any guide to update the master data thru migration cokcpit?

SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
